name: taleseal
description: Seal a Codex run as a shareable tale — preview, confirm, publish, report the URL.

interface.shortDescription: Seal Codex runs as shareable tales
interface.longDescription: Turn the current Codex session into a shareable tale at a short URL: compose a local preview (title, status, beats, receipts, redaction report), show it to you, and publish only after you confirm. Failed and abandoned runs are first-class tales too.
